title: Gooey Spanish Beef Stir-fry
description: A herbal and gooey vegan-friendly Spanish dish featuring ground beef in a bhuna sauce for meal prep.

ingredients.name: Bhuna Sauce (Spices)
ingredients.notes: Includes turmeric, cumin, coriander, chili powder, garam masala

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon if needed.
Add onions and garlic, sautéing for about 2 minutes until fragrant and translucent.
Add red bell pepper and green peppers, stirring to combine with the meat and vegetables.
Pour in tomato paste and stir continuously for about 1 minute. It will thicken quickly so keep an eye on it.
Gradually add Bhuna Sauce, stirring constantly while cooking until slightly reduced and thickened (about 5 minutes).
Stir in Vegan Cream Cheese, continuing to mix well until the sauce is creamy and evenly coated with cheese.
Serve hot as a main dish or use for meal prepping. Store any leftover in an airtight container in the fridge.
